title: juncus acutiflorus subsp. acutiflorus
intro: Juncus acutiflorus subsp. acutiflorus, also known as Sharp-flowered Rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and expectorant effects, which are believed to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is said to possess several health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal medicine, Sharp-flowered Rush is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
